scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @celeris/shared && npm run build --workspace @celeris/db && npm run build --workspace @celeris/sdk-browser && npm run build --workspace @celeris/sdk-server && npm run build --workspace @celeris/api && npm run build --workspace @celeris/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/sdk-browser && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/sdk-server && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @celeris/shared && npm run test --workspace @celeris/sdk-browser && npm run test --workspace @celeris/api && npm run test --workspace @celeris/web
